query:

('Yarrow', 'White', 'premium', 12.00, 5.00, 9.00, 12.00, 100, true, NOW(), NOW()),
('Yarrow', 'Red', 'premium', 12.00, 5.00, 9.00, 12.00, 100, true, NOW(), NOW()),

("St John's Wort", 'Yellow', 'specialty', 21.00, 9.00, 15.00, 21.00, 100, true, NOW(), NOW()),
('Bee Balm', 'Pink', 'specialty', 21.00, 9.00, 15.00, 21.00, 100, true, NOW(), NOW()),
('Gomphrena', 'Red', 'specialty', 21.00, 9.00, 15.00, 21.00, 100, true, NOW(), NOW()),
('Verbena', 'Purple', 'specialty', 21.00, 9.00, 15.00, 21.00, 100, true, NOW(), NOW());
